hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.go ]]; then gofumpt -w "$file" && goimports -local github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v3 -w "$file"; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.pb.go ]] || [[ "$file" == *.pb.gw.go ]] || [[ "$file" == */generated.proto ]] || [[ "$file" == */generated.pb.go ]] || [[ "$file" == go.sum ]] || [[ "$file" == */yarn.lock ]]; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit generated or lock files directly. Use make codegen-local or go mod tidy instead.' && exit 1; fi
